flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Laredo College are 14% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($33.9k vs $39.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 42% at Laredo College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.1k vs 8.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Laredo College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (8.0k → 5.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Laredo College rose 27% between 2017 and 2020 ($2.3k → $3.0k).
